project_type: Full-stack VPN panel: Go backend + Vue 3 SPA (admin + portal)
build_system: Vite for frontend, go build for backend
test_framework: vitest for frontend, go test for backend
build_command: cd panel/web/admin && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build && cd ../portal && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
test_command: cd panel/web/admin && npx vitest run; cd ../shared && npx vitest run
verification_instructions: 1. Run vue-tsc --noEmit in admin and portal dirs. 2. Run vite build in both. 3. Run vitest run in admin and shared.
setup_instructions: node_modules already installed in panel/web/admin, panel/web/portal, panel/web/shared
environment_constraints: No Go compiler available for backend tests. Frontend build/typecheck only. No docker. node_modules pre-installed.
contribution_requirements: Create new branch, new PR. Do not update old PR #68. Update-friendly code (additive i18n keys, backward-compatible).
key_patterns: Pinia composition API stores with useApi composable. useI18n with registerMessages pattern. CSS custom properties in tokens.css. [data-theme] attribute for theme switching. [dir=rtl] CSS selectors. KorisPanel shared UI components under @koris/ui/ alias. Backend uses http.ServeMux with pathID helper for REST routing. panel_settings table stores key-value config pairs.
directory_structure: panel/panel/internal/api/ - Go backend. panel/panel/web/admin/ - Admin SPA. panel/panel/web/portal/ - Customer portal SPA. panel/panel/web/shared/ - Shared composables, styles, components, types.
